text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash informs us that "Leckermaul" is the
name of the bad witch that appears in the
German fairy tale, Hansel and Gretel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe is racked with anxiety over the
possibility of her guiding friend being a
malevolent witch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerned about Manhattan Cafe, Zenno Rob
Roy tells us that good witches also exist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We learn that Zenno Rob Roy intends to enter
the Japan Cup. Manhattan Cafe's friend has put
us on a collision course with another rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what will Manhattan Cafe learn from her race
with Zenno Rob Roy?
